item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three source files, make the smallest schema/model/query changes, then run the test suite.
The schema generator owns the base collection validator, so I’m layering the new optional enum constraint without replacing its existing validation rules.

item.aggregated_output:

npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo

item.text:
Implemented `preferredPaymentMethod` support across accounts and order summaries.

- Added optional enum validation in `src/schema.mjs`
- Preserved the field in account creation and updates
- Included it in `getOrderSummary`
- Ensured account creation satisfies the existing `createdAt` schema requirement

Verified with `npm test` — acceptance tests pass.
